stemHtml:
An aircraft descends from flight level 180 to ground level with a constant TAS of 220 kt.The TT in descent is 080°. The W/V at various flight levels in the area are given below.

FL W/V
ground level 260°/25 kt
30 270°/30 kt
60 270°/35 kt
90 270°/40 kt
120 280°/50 kt
150 285°/55 kt
180 290°/55 kt

Calculate the average GS in descent.
